name: The Superhero League
author: Poki
description: The Superhero League is a shooting game where you unleash awesome superpowers to take down dangerous enemies! Burn, freeze, lift, and blast your way through clever levels designed to test your hero skills, from controlling elements to using speed, wind, and ice. Choose your favorite hero, solve puzzles in style, and show enemies that a gun is no match for superpowers. Ready to save the day? The power is in your hands! How to play The Superhero League? Click or hold to aim, release to shoot. Who created The Superhero League? The Superhero League is created by Lion Studios. Play their other games on Poki: Sticker Book Puzzle , Family Tree! , Flick Goal , Mr Bullet , Love Balls and Happy Glass ! How can I play The Superhero League for free? You can play The Superhero League for free on Poki. Can I play The Superhero League on mobile devices and desktop? The Superhero League can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
